name: claude-5h-window-spread
description: Stop Claude Code Pro/Max 5-hour rolling window cap hits and rate-limit lockouts. Self-contained skill that asks your work pattern, computes optimal cron pings, and installs them via the local OS scheduler (macOS launchd / Linux cron / Windows Task Scheduler). Pure Python stdlib, zero external deps. For heavy users (devs hitting daily limits) on Pro/Max plans. Keywords: 5h limit, 5 hour limit, session limit, rate limit, claude pro plan, claude max plan, window warmup, lockout, rolling window, automation, anthropic.
